name: jake-financial-plugins
description: Private financial services plugins: financial analysis, private equity, and equity research

plugins.name: financial-analysis
plugins.description: Core financial modeling and analysis tools: DCF, comps, LBO, 3-statement models, competitive analysis, and deck QC

plugins.name: private-equity
plugins.description: Private equity deal sourcing and workflow tools: deal screening, IC memos, DD prep, portfolio monitoring, and returns analysis

plugins.name: equity-research
plugins.description: Equity research tools: earnings analysis, initiating coverage reports, morning notes, and sector overviews
